channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 'Holy crap, this is not how you cool facilities' — Nuclear engineer wants to use special bubbles to save AI data centers from a massive energy crisis
item.description: MIT researchers adapted nuclear reactor cooling principles to reduce energy consumption and water use in rapidly expanding AI data centers.

item.title: How the Peter Thiel-Linked Dialog Club Secretly Ranks Its Members
item.description: Leaked files show the invite-only network grades members by their money and fame, shaping who’s in, who’s out, and who pays.

item.title: Quote of the day by SpaceX CEO Elon Musk: "One of the biggest mistakes we made was trying to automate things that are super easy for a person to do" — remarks on where automation got it wrong
item.description: Elon Musk has been a central figure in the AI and robotics build-out, with his company Tesla being one of the key players in the modern landscape

item.title: Netflix has canceled The Boroughs after one season despite rave reviews — but there's a major reason why it's not coming back
item.description: The Boroughs will not be returning to Netflix which may seem like a shocking decision.

item.title: Can ‘Applied Creativity’ be the next ‘Design Thinking?’
item.description: A new report from Accenture Song uncovers the secret sauce that makes Lego, Ikea, and Rivian creative powerhouses. In a January 2025 podcast episode, Open AI CEO Sam Altman was asked what the most important skill would be in the age of AI. His answer was—in simplest terms—the ability to ask creative questions. Last summer, Mustafa Suleyman, CEO of Microsoft AI, wrote that, for all the fear about AI, he genuinely believes that “creativity will remain the real currency.” And in an August Business Insider feature, Autodesk CEO Andrew Anagnost said that people will need to become “creative orchest...

item.title: Samsung passe sa superbe TV QD-OLED S95F sous la barre des 1250 euros
item.description: Besoin d'une qualité d'image d'exception pour vos soirées cinéma ? Le téléviseur ultra haut de gamme Samsung S95F en version 55 pouces est actuellement disponible à 1249 euros chez Joybuy. En plus de ce tarif avantageux, vous profitez en prime de l'installation murale totalement offerte.

item.title: Adobe glisse son assistant IA Firefly dans Premiere, Illustrator et InDesign pour faire les corvées
item.description: Adobe glisse son assistant Firefly directement dans Premiere, Illustrator et InDesign. Promesse : confier les corvées répétitives à l’IA pour garder les mains libres sur la créa.

item.title: This SIM-card-sized 8TB PCIe 5.0 SSD hits 11GB/s, but AI firms will likely hoard them all — and Longsys's jaw-dropping mSSD also sports VC phase-change liquid cooling
item.description: Longsys's latest mSSD builds on Gen 4 by delivering double the maximum capacity and a massive upgrade in read/write speeds, thanks to a new controller under the hood.

item.title: AI inference startup Baseten reportedly raising $1.5B months after its last mega-round
item.description: Startup Baseten is reportedly close to finalizing a $1.5 billion round at a $13 billion as the “inference gold rush" marches on.

item.title: Experts warns AI toy apps for kids are tracking users and collecting personal data
item.description: In a recent study by Cybernews, applications tied to 10 different toys each requested permissions and privileges categorized as 'dangerous'.

item.title: The White House Is Making Up Its Rules for AI in Real Time
item.description: Anthropic still can’t distribute Claude Mythos or Fable 5 after running afoul of the Trump administration. But no one can say exactly what the company did wrong.

item.title: Why were Waymo cars driving into active construction zones?
item.description: Nearly 4,000 robotaxis are being recalled after more than a dozen incidents of the driverless vehicles entering hazardous areas. After driving into floodwater, gates, and telephone poles, Waymo’s robotaxis are being recalled yet again for driving into hazards. This time, Waymo’s fleet of nearly 4,000 vehicles is being recalled after at least 13 instances of the cars driving into construction zones on highways....

item.title: How to watch Mexico vs. South Korea online for free
item.description: How to watch World Cup for free. Live stream Mexico vs. South Korea in the 2026 FIFA World Cup for free from anywhere in the world.
